articles.title: MetaMask Mobile Users Can Now Buy ETH Using PayPal
articles.description: The new feature, available only to select US customers for now, lets Web3 users go from cash to ether via PayPal for a 1% fee

articles.title: ADA Consolidates As Hoskinson Envisions Multiple Major Blockchains Like Solana Becoming A Sidechain to Cardano
articles.description: As ADA trades sideways, its co-founder Charles Hoskinson suggests having Solana as a sidechain (a separate blockchain connected to the main blockchain) for Cardano.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs Plans To Splash Millions Of Dollars Into Crypto Firms After FTX Implosion
articles.description: Goldman Sachs plans to splash “tens of millions of dollars” on investments or buyouts in crypto firms after the FTX collapse hit last month and suppressed investor interest. The FTX collapse and subsequent contagion across major lending firms had elicited calls for more regulatory oversight on players, assuring big banks of the sector’s stability. In […]
